hero.badge: Consultant — Future Roles / Talent Pool · Contract
hero.description: Quantitative analytics consultant with fifteen years designing forecasting models, risk analytics, and evidence-based reporting in regulated financial services and global industrial environments. MS in Economics and a graduate certificate in Applied Econometrics, with production experience in time series forecasting, statistical outlier detection, classification modeling, and audit-ready documentation for executive and compliance reviewers. Translate complex analytical output into clear recommendations for mixed technical and non-technical stakeholders. Available for consultant roles with Summit directly or as an independent subcontractor through Your Website In 7 Days, LLC, with standard MSA and W-9 on file.

highlights.label: Applied econometrics and time series forecasting

items.title: Risk Analytics and Time Series Forecasting Specialist
bullets: Designed and deployed an automated ARIMA forecasting platform on a scheduled production pipeline, with model validation, anomaly review, and trend reporting used by actuarial and finance leadership before period close.

Built statistical outlier and anomaly detection frameworks using probability density function methods across platforms processing more than a trillion records, supporting early warning on attribute drift and program integrity review.
Authored model lifecycle documentation and methodology summaries for business and governance reviewers, translating statistical output into plain-language narratives for mixed audiences.

items.title: Data Science and Program Analytics Consultant
bullets: Led a classification machine learning rebuild of a regulated reporting workflow, materially improving accuracy, consistency, and audit readiness; work received formal recognition from client executive leadership.

Developed repeatable period-over-period valuation movement analysis across time periods and source systems, with documented methodology and audit-friendly outputs other teams extended for variance and trend work.
Architected the metadata and data-lineage reference standard for a strategic enterprise data warehouse, establishing engineering and analytics standards on lineage, data quality, and audit controls.

items.title: Evidence-Based Reporting and Analytics Lead
bullets: Build executive dashboards in Power BI, Tableau, and SSRS and brief senior leaders on findings, assumptions, and recommended next steps.
Led cross-functional reporting modernization that improved validation checkpoints and operational efficiency before numbers reached executive sponsors.

groups.title: Econometrics and modeling
items: ARIMA, time series forecasting, applied econometrics, statistical outlier detection, classification machine learning, model validation and diagnostics, cointegration and multivariate time series methods

groups.title: Languages and platforms
items: Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, statsmodels), R, SAS, SQL, Databricks, advanced Excel and VBA

groups.title: Reporting and delivery
items: Power BI, Tableau, SSRS, governed model documentation, executive written and oral briefing, remote contract collaboration

contact.label: 06 / Hire
contact.title: Available for Contract Engagements
contact.intro: Open to contract roles through agencies and direct clients. Based in Illinois; available for remote and hybrid engagements.

valueItems.label: Fast ramp
valueItems.body: Deep domain experience across regulated enterprise environments

valueItems.label: Independent execution
valueItems.body: Self-directed within matrix teams across finance, IT, and compliance
